description: S15/message-action delete: send a self message, confirm it persists, delete it via the message-action hook, confirm it is gone. Hermetic — does not need the echo peer (asserts only on the self message). Maps to test/mcp/S15 (delete item) at the state layer; the menu-surface UI is the separate residual. #18: text carries a per-run {{nonce}} so a cross-run survivor can't satisfy/violate the equals:0 assertion.
